emotional_tone: Objective, secure, professional, highly functional, no-nonsense

typography.instructions: Import Cabinet Grotesk from fontshare or define via custom @font-face. Import Manrope and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts. Use font-mono for all money amounts, percentages, and dates to ensure vertical alignment in tables.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Tailwind p-6 or p-8 for card padding. Gap-6 for grid items.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_structure: Sidebar (w-64) + Main Content area. Sidebar is fixed, main area scrolls.

grids.main_widget: col-span-1 lg:col-span-2 bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 rounded-xl p-6
grids.side_widget: col-span-1 bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 rounded-xl p-6

surface_strategy.cards: Flat background (bg-neutral-900), 1px subtle border (border-neutral-800), slightly rounded corners (rounded-xl), no shadow by default. On interactive cards, add hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-neutral-700 transition-all duration-200.
surface_strategy.header_glassmorphism: If using a sticky header, use backdrop-blur-xl bg-neutral-950/70 border-b border-neutral-800.
surface_strategy.sidebar: Solid bg-neutral-950 border-r border-neutral-800. Active link: bg-blue-600/10 text-blue-500. Inactive link: text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-50 hover:bg-neutral-900.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-neutral-800 hover:bg-neutral-700 text-neutral-50 border border-neutral-700 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-neutral-950 border border-neutral-800 text-neutral-50 placeholder:text-neutral-600 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-500 border-b border-neutral-800 pb-3

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

motion.hover: Subtle background color changes and slight transforms (e.g., -translate-y-0.5) for interactive cards.
motion.lists: Staggered fade-in for table rows or list items if possible.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons. Stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for clarity.

image_urls.description: High-end abstract dark geometric fintech background to be used in the login/register screen split layout.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI exclusively in Portuguese (BR) as requested.
Enforce Dark Theme by applying the 'dark' class to the html/body element and using the specified neutral-950/900 color palette.
Do NOT use HTML native date pickers or select dropdowns. Use Shadcn components and customize them to fit the dark neutral theme.
All money amounts (R$) MUST use the 'font-mono' utility class to ensure numbers align properly vertically.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"').
For the Login/Register page, use a split screen layout: 50% form on the left, 50% image using the 'login_background' URL on the right.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Control Room' grid: dense, organized data presentation with a Sidebar.
Make sure text contrasts meet accessibility standards: use text-neutral-50 for primary text and text-neutral-400 for secondary text on neutral-900/950 backgrounds.
